item.title: Revlon Super Lustrous Creme Lipstick Rum Raisin 535 4 2 g
item.description: There’s a deal Revlon Super Lustrous Creme Lipstick Rum Raisin 535 4 2 g here: ℹ️: Kleur 011 Stormachtig Roze 4,2 g Kleurrijk Iriserende lippenstift 🛒 Buy it now!!
